nextAction: test localized near-wing geometric refinement or improved link-quadrature realization before changing population reconstruction

qualificationAmendment.reason: The preregistered c8 instrumentation-only smoke proved exact history replay and 1.24e-7 population reconstruction, but exposed a host report filter that copied the intentionally uncaptured phase-0 slot as two zero-support samples.
qualificationAmendment.scope: Move the phase-0 exclusion from the mechanism-report copier to the boundary-source-report copier; no Metal arithmetic, solver state, selected phase, decomposition, threshold, or decision rule changed.

scientificVerdict: the preregistered primary near-wing source is classified as directionalLinkSamplingDominated; this selects the next numerical discriminator without validating formation benefit
title: Formation Flight boundary population source discriminator
